title: 10 Signs a Man of God Has Flipped Grace and Judgment
caption:
Most guys think they're hard on themselves and gentle with everyone else. Check the last argument you had.

Somewhere along the way it got flipped. Quick to explain away your own stuff, slow to extend the same grace to her, to your brother, to the guy who cut you off in traffic. Grace runs downhill from everyone but you.

Jesus flipped tables and wept at a tomb. He also said the measure you use will be measured back to you. That cuts the other way too: the mercy you withhold from other people is the mercy you're actually asking God not to give you.

"For with the judgment you pronounce you will be judged, and with the measure you use it will be measured to you." — Matthew 7:2

Here are 10 signs you've got it backwards.

Save this and read it again the next time you're about to judge somebody faster than you'd judge yourself.

#faith #christianmen #humility #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
